headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Aon, Raises Price Target to $380
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Phillips   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $370 to $380.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Aon, Raises Price Target to $380
raw.summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Phillips   maintains Aon (NYSE:AON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $370 to $380.

headline: What to Expect From Aon plc’s Q2 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Aon is expected to release its fiscal Q2 earnings soon, and analysts project a single-digit EPS rise.
